get_ontology.description: Returns all entity types and relationship predicates in the knowledge graph.

get_subjects.description: Lists entity URIs in the graph, optionally filtered by type.

query_by_pattern.description: Retrieves structured data by traversing graph relationships using triple patterns.

search_content.description: Find detailed content using semantic similarity search.

pathway_list_jobs.description: List jobs (discipline x level x track) defined in the pathway framework.

pathway_describe_job.description: Describe a job at (discipline, level, optional track) including skills, behaviours, and responsibilities.

pathway_list_agent_profiles.description: List static agent profile (discipline, track) combinations.

pathway_describe_agent_profile.description: Describe stage agent profiles for a (discipline, track).

pathway_describe_progression.description: Compute the progression delta between two levels of the same discipline.

pathway_list_job_software.description: List the software toolkit derived for a job.
